title: 8 Pc Template Stencil Set Drawing Arts and Crafts Ovals Circles Squares Hexagons
description:
This is the ultimate stencil set with 8 sheets of different stencils! Features a dedicated oval, circle, and square stencil with varying sizes. Another sheet features circles,hexagons, pentagons, and triangles; and another features perspective shapes. Three sheets feature a high variety of unique assorted shapes in different sizes. Stencils are clear so you can see the rest of your drawing as you draw the stencil. This is a must-have for artists who enjoy drawing with ink, pencil, charcoal, or pastels. These stencils also work well for painters in the sketching stage of their art. Don't forget this next art project!
